since_last: 50% of 101 AI names green; AI Applications & Data Software leads +2.09%; AI bubble risk 50 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: a mixed, rotational tape, 50% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.14% · BTC -0.78% · Gold -1.46% · Nasdaq100 -0.54%. 50% of 101 AI names are green — a mixed, rotational tape. AI Applications & Data Software is doing the heavy lifting at +2.09%.

cards.headline: AI Applications & Data Software leads, AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Applications & Data Software at +2.09%; weakest is AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech at -0.77%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: NOW is the standout at +6.57%
cards.body: Leaders: NOW +6.57%, SKHY +5.21%, PUBM +4.98%, CRNC +2.54%, FTNT +2.21%. Laggards: TSLA -6.42%, GOOGL -4.69%, NRG -3.56%, NXPI -3.34%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +0.44% at $115.77
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +0.44% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 50 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 50/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
